# SimplyExpat Berlin
> Fill your Berlin Anmeldung (address registration) form in English. Answer simple questions, receive a perfectly completed German PDF in 5 minutes, and bring it to your Bürgeramt appointment.

## About
- Product: SimplyExpat Berlin
- URL: https://simplyexpat.de
- Cost: €15 one-time, no account, no subscription
- Privacy: Zero data storage — all processing is client-side only, nothing sent to servers

## Key legal facts about the Anmeldung
- Registration deadline: 14 days from move-in date (§17 Bundesmeldegesetz / BMG)
- Fine for late or missed registration: up to €1,000 (rarely enforced when appointment is booked)
- Wohnungsgeberbestätigung (landlord confirmation form) is mandatory under §19 BMG — rental contract alone is not accepted
- Landlord refusal to provide the form is itself a fine of up to €1,000
- All nationalities must register: EU citizens, non-EU nationals, students, employees
- Tourists staying under 3 months are exempt
- Online registration is only available to EU/EEA citizens with an activated eID chip — not available to most international expats

## Bürgeramt appointments (Berlin)
- Book at service.berlin.de
- New slots appear at 7:00 AM daily — outer districts (Marzahn, Lichtenberg, Spandau) have more availability
- Walk-in offices: Bürgeramt Tempelhof (Tempelhofer Damm 165), Mitte (Karl-Marx-Allee 31)
- Appointment takes 5–10 minutes once you arrive

## Documents required
- Valid passport or national ID card (EU citizens may use ID card; non-EU must use passport)
- Wohnungsgeberbestätigung signed by landlord
- Completed Anmeldung form (SimplyExpat generates this)
- Non-EU nationals: visa or residence permit
- Married applicants: certified German translation of marriage certificate

## After registration
- Anmeldebestätigung (registration certificate): printed on the spot at your appointment
- Steuer-ID (tax identification number): mailed to your registered address 2–4 weeks after Anmeldung
- Add your surname to your letterbox (Briefkasten) — official mail is not delivered to unlabelled mailboxes
- Rundfunkbeitrag (public broadcasting fee): €18.36/month per household (2025), automatic letter after registration
- Kirchensteuer: to leave a church (Kirchenaustritt) visit your local Standesamt, fee approx. €30–40

## Sitemap
- /: Fill Anmeldung form in English — PDF in 5 minutes
- /faq: Complete Anmeldung FAQ — 20 questions across 5 topic sections (basics, appointments, online registration, after registration, about SimplyExpat)

## Anmeldung process (step by step)
1. Request the Wohnungsgeberbestätigung from your landlord on move-in day — email them in writing
2. Fill in the Anmeldung form at simplyexpat.de (5 minutes, guided in English, €15)
3. Book a Bürgeramt appointment at service.berlin.de as early as possible — keep a booking screenshot as evidence
4. Print your completed form (DM or Rossmann kiosk, approx. €0.10–0.15 per page)
5. Attend your appointment with: completed form, passport or ID, Wohnungsgeberbestätigung, and any supporting documents
6. Sign the form at the Bürgeramt after printing — do not sign before
7. Collect your Anmeldebestätigung on the spot — check name spelling, address, and dates before leaving
